ground.what_this_is: This is a detailed 'Workshop' view for a specific node (the 'ask' process) on the canvas, designed to show the full output and configuration of that single node in a deep-dive mode.
ground.what_you_can_do: You can read the node's full output, view its configuration settings, see its status (currently 'ran'), and inspect its input/output ports and provenance details.

howto.what_you_can_do: Trigger a forced resolution or state change on the current node (mockup-only; not yet built).

howto.what: The run command on the workshop toolbar.
howto.what_you_can_do: Execute the current node's configuration to generate its output and update the live board state.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the workshop region (runtime/suite.py:ui_info); changing the provenance display is a code change there.
howto.what: The provenance layer on the workshop view, displaying the node's origin and authorship status.
howto.what_you_can_do: Read the node's origin history and authorship details to understand its lineage and who created it.

howto.how_to_change: This is a read-only view in the mockup; changes to configuration require editing the node definition in the workshop region (runtime/suite.py:ui_info) and re-running the self-modification path.
howto.what: The configuration display for the current node within the workshop view.
howto.what_you_can_do: Read the node's current settings and status (currently 'ran') to understand its operational parameters.
